summary: CocoIndex and code graph should not collapse into one mandatory ranking pipeline today; adapt a pluggable, default-off fusion stage with component telemetry, and defer active rerank until Phases 001/002/003 supply real graph-side signals.

label: Fused rerank is viable only as a post-retrieval plugin, not as the default CocoIndex path
Fusion should live in a new pure lib/search module rather than cocoindex-calibration.ts
Normalize heterogeneous features with deterministic clamps/log caps and fixed heuristic weights before any learned weighting
Active fusion hard-depends on Phases 001-003 because current runtime lacks role, trace-distance, and centrality inputs
Feature flag, shadow mode, and fail-closed standalone CocoIndex fallback are required to avoid tight coupling
A single fusedScore can order results, but component scores and skip reasons must stay visible for audit and ablation
